sources.title: Black Christmas (1974 Horror) Directed by Bob Clark
sources.description:
Have yourself a scary little Christmas...Not at all like the ones you used to know.

Director: Bob Clark
Writer: Roy Moore
Genres: Horror, Mystery, Thriller

Main Cast:
Olivia Hussey as Jess
Keir Dullea as Peter
Margot Kidder as Barb
John Saxon as Lt. Fuller
Marian Waldman as Mrs. MacHenry (Mrs. Mac)
Andrea Martin as Phyl
James Edmond as Mr. Harrison
Douglas McGrath as Sergeant Nash
Art Hindle as Chris
Lynne Griffin as Clare

FunFact: Bob Clark’s Black Christmas is widely acknowledged as the origin of the modern slasher film.

Original title: Black Christmas (1974)

metadata.Plot: It's time for Christmas break, and the sorority sisters make plans for the holiday, but the strange anonymous phone calls are beginning to put them on edge. When Clare disappears, they contact the police, who don't express much concern. Meanwhile Jess is planning to get an abortion, but boyfriend Peter is very much against it. The police finally begin to get concerned when a 13-year-old girl is found dead in the park. They set up a wiretap to the sorority house, but will they be in time to prevent a sorority girl attrition problem?
metadata.Actors: Olivia Hussey, Keir Dullea, Margot Kidder
